externalName: Torres del Sol 12th floor Teide and Atlantic view
description:
Featuring air-conditioned accommodation with a private pool, mountain view and a balcony, Torres del Sol 12th floor Teide and Atlantic view - Las Americas is located in Playa de las Americas. Among the facilities of this property are a restaurant, bar and 2 lifts, along with free WiFi throughout the property. The apartment also offers facilities for disabled guests.

The apartment is equipped with 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV with streaming services, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchen, and a terrace with sea views. Guests can enjoy a meal on an outdoor dining area while overlooking the pool views. The accommodation is non-smoking.

There is a coffee shop, and a minimarket is also available.

For guests with children, the propery provides kids pool. 

Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Las Vistas Beach, Camison Beach and Los Cristianos Beach. Tenerife South Airport is 17 km away.
airbnbSummary:
Cozy and spacious apartment with breathtaking view from the balcony over one of the best beaches in Tenerife called "Las Vistas" .
Bedroom view over Los Cristianos and in the distance you can see the "Teide" volcano

description:
Featuring air-conditioned accommodation with a private pool, pool view and a balcony, Ocean View Las Americas is located in Playa de las Americas. Among the facilities at this property are a lift and a minimarket, along with free WiFi throughout the property. 

The apartment with a terrace and sea views features 1 bedroom, a living room, a flat-screen TV, an equipped kitchen with an oven and a microwave, and 1 bathroom with a walk-in shower. 

A bar can be found on-site.

Popular points of interest near the apartment include Playa de Las Americas, Playa de Troya and Bobo Beach. The nearest airport is Tenerife South Airport, 17 km from Ocean View Las Americas.
airbnbSummary: Apartment with terrace located on the upper floor with a spectacular view.

description:
Situated in Playa de las Americas, near El Bunker Beach and Playa de Las Americas, Central Charm - Las Americas is a recently renovated property, featuring, an outdoor swimming pool and garden. Among the facilities of this property are a restaurant, a lift and full-day security, along with free WiFi. The property is non-smoking and is set less than 1 km from Camison Beach.

Offering direct access to a terrace with garden views, the air-conditioned apartment consists of 1 bedroom and a fully equipped kitchen. A flat-screen TV is available.

There is a snack bar, and a minimarket is also available.

Popular points of interest near the apartment include Piramide de Arona Convention Centre, Golf Las Americas and Siam Park. Tenerife South Airport is 17 km from the property.
airbnbSummary: Familia ta va fi aproape de tot, stând în această locuință situată central.

description:
Featuring a balcony with sea views, an outdoor swimming pool and a garden, Premier View Las Americas can be found in Arona, close to Playa de Las Americas and 400 metres from Playa de Troya. Among the facilities of this property are a restaurant, a lift and full-day security, along with free WiFi throughout the property. The property is non-smoking and is located less than 1 km from Bobo Beach.

The spacious apartment features a terrace, 2 bedrooms, a living room and a well-equipped kitchen with an oven and a microwave. Towels and bed linen are provided in the apartment. Additional in-room amenities include wine or champagne.

There is a coffee shop, and a minimarket is also available.

Popular points of interest near the apartment include Siam Park, Piramide de Arona Convention Centre and Golf Las Americas. Tenerife South Airport is 17 km away.
airbnbSummary: Bucură-te de acces ușor la tot ceea ce vrei să vizitezi, din această locuință situată perfect.

description:
Featuring air-conditioned accommodation with a private pool, pool view and a balcony, Atlantic Sunset Floor - Las Americas is located in Playa de las Americas. Among the facilities of this property are a restaurant, a lift and full-day security, along with free WiFi throughout the property. 

The apartment comes with 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV with streaming services, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchen, and a terrace with sea views. The unit at the property features a walk-in shower.

There is a coffee shop, and a minimarket is also available.


Popular points of interest near the apartment include Playa de Las Americas, Playa de Troya and Bobo Beach. Tenerife South Airport is 17 km away.
airbnbSummary: Spectacular apartment located in the heart of las americas on the top floor offering a view over the entire central area and towards the beaches.

description:
Spanish Sunrise Las Americas is a recently renovated apartment in Playa de las Americas, where guests can makes the most of its outdoor swimming pool, garden and bar. Among the facilities at this property are a lift and a concierge service, along with free WiFi throughout the property. The property is non-smoking and is located 400 metres from Playa de Las Americas.

The spacious apartment with a terrace and sea views features 2 bedrooms, a living room, a flat-screen TV, an equipped kitchen with a microwave and a toaster, and 1 bathroom . The property offers pool views.

Guests can eat in the on-site family-friendly restaurant, which is open for dinner, lunch, brunch and cocktails.


Popular points of interest near the apartment include Playa de Troya, Bobo Beach and Siam Park. Tenerife South Airport is 17 km away.
airbnbSummary: Bucură-te de acces ușor la tot ceea ce vrei să vizitezi, din această locuință situată perfect.

description:
Boasting air-conditioned accommodation with a patio, Panoramic Floor - Las Americas is set in Playa de las Americas. Among the facilities of this property are a restaurant, a lift and a concierge service, along with free WiFi throughout the property. The outdoor swimming pool features a pool bar and fence.

The spacious apartment has 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV with streaming services, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchen, and a terrace with sea views. Guests can take in the views of the pool from the balcony, which also has outdoor furniture. The accommodation is non-smoking.

There is a coffee shop, and a minimarket is also available.


Popular points of interest near the apartment include Playa de Las Americas, Playa de Troya and Bobo Beach. Tenerife South Airport is 17 km from the property.

description:
Enjoy a bright, modern apartment located on an upper floor in Playa Honda, offering beautiful open views and plenty of natural light.
The apartment features one comfortable bedroom, a stylish living area and everything needed for a relaxing stay.
Perfect for couples or solo travelers looking for comfort, views and a great location close to the coast.
